title: The Meeting
overview: Despised by her stepmother and sister, Miyo is treated like a servant in her own home. One day, her father calls her in to discuss her future.

title: About My Husband-to-Be
overview: Determined to be of use, Miyo wakes up early and prepares breakfast, but Kiyoka accuses her of trying to poison him and refuses to take a bite.

title: Our First Date
overview: While Kiyoka takes Miyo out to town, he quickly notices that she behaves very differently from other wealthy daughters he's encountered.

title: The Gift
overview: To surprise Kiyoka with a handmade gift, Miyo goes into town to shop for some material. Meanwhile, Kiyoka pays Miyo's parents a visit.

title: Ripples
overview: Engulfed with jealousy, Kaya tries to thwart Miyo's engagement to Kiyoka. Miyo leaves the house and forgets to bring the good luck charm Kiyoka gave her.

title: Determination and Thunder
overview: Miyo wakes up to her sister and stepmother threatening her. Together with Koji, Kiyoka arrives at the Saimori home and demands to see his fiancée.

title: Glamorous Lady of Summer
overview: Kiyoka accompanies Miyo to the remains of the Saimori home at her request. Later, a stunning visitor comes by their home.

title: Nightmares and Ominous Shadows
overview: Hazuki and Miyo grow closer through their lessons. Worried, Kiyoka tries to get to the bottom of Miyo's relentless nightmares.

title: Drowning in Dreams
overview: Though distressed by her nightmares, Miyo keeps pushing herself to be a supportive wife. Then, Arata Tsuruki comes to speak to her while Kiyoka is away.

title: Summer Cherry Blossoms, and the Mistake
overview: Arata reveals his true identity and introduces Miyo to the grandfather she never knew. They claim they can cure her nightmares — on one condition.

title: My Mother's Legacy
overview: Yoshiro Usuba tells Miyo about how her mother came to marry her father — and why she made a decision that changed her only daughter's life forever.

title: Light in the Darkness
overview: Miyo's powers are everyone's last hope of waking Kiyoka from his unconscious state. But before she can rescue him, she must face the shadow of her past.

title: Another Kudo Residence
overview: While out shopping, Miyo has a chilling vision — only to be surprised by her future father-in-law, who invites her and Kiyoka to their countryside estate.

title: A New Ordeal
overview: Unhappy with her son's engagement, Fuyu commands Miyo to perform housekeeping duties. Meanwhile, Kiyoka makes a shocking discovery at an abandoned house.

title: The Gifted Communion and Demons
overview: As Miyo tries to save a villager using Dream-Sight, Kiyoka battles a demon. Later, Arata shares surprising information on the Gifted Communion's founder.

title: What the Autumn Breeze Brought
overview: Upon returning to the capital, the group has an unsettling encounter with Naoshi Usui. Kiyoka assigns Miyo a bodyguard: the dashing Kaoruko Jinnouchi.

title: Deep Within the Heart
overview: Miyo overhears soldiers disparaging Kaoruko and defends her friend. Later, she has a troubling nightmare. Is it just a dream or a glimpse of the future?

title: The Man Called Naoshi Usui
overview: As Kiyoka rushes to meet Arata at the imperial family's vacation estate, Usui surprises Miyo and her guards at the dojo, revealing a traitor among them.

title: A New Year's Commotion
overview: After a tender New Year's Eve, Miyo and Kiyoka make their first shrine visit together. Meanwhile, Takahito learns of growing unrest in the streets.

title: An Evening Banquet and Distant Snow
overview: At a surprise gathering, Hazuki and her guests share their thoughts on love. Later, Miyo's worries grow after learning of Takahito's ominous vision.

title: Dream Tidings
overview: While Kiyoka's unit investigates a strange demon, the Gifted Communion makes a ruthless move. Miyo enters a foreboding dream where a young Usui awaits.

title: Promise
overview: Determined to save her fiancé, Miyo sneaks out and runs into a young boy with a familiar face. Later, she dreams of a tragic promise from the past.

title: A Resolute Departure
overview: After awakening from her dream, Miyo begins to gather allies for the rescue mission. Will her blossoming powers be enough to save Kiyoka and stop Usui?

title: Feelings Beyond Dreams
overview: In the final battle, Usui overwhelms Kiyoka, trapping him in a terrible nightmare. Desperate to prevent more bloodshed, Miyo dives into the dream.

title: Once Spring Has Come
overview: After the battle, Miyo confides in Arata about her regrets. Kiyoka makes a big life decision. Later, Hazuki surprises Miyo with a heartfelt wedding gift.
